gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 found that builtin factory filling could drop explicit unplanned factories; patched the helper to preserve explicit entries so matching-key validation rejects extras and added a regression test.
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_benchmark_plan.py tests/test_native_probe_factories.py tests/test_public_package.py tests/test_project_governance.py -q
what_changed: Added benchmark-plan opt-in for package-owned vLLM/SGLang native probe factory paths.
why: Release plans need stable built-in factory targets for planned native engine probes while preserving fail-closed evidence integrity until real backend block-manager adapters exist.
